scripts.dev:frontend: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend && npm run dev -- --port 5173; else echo '• frontend/package.json missing — drop the Lovable export into frontend/'; fi
scripts.install:backend: cd backend && (test -d .venv || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -q --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -q -e '.[dev]' && (test -f .env || cp .env.example .env)
scripts.install:frontend: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then cd frontend && npm install; else echo '• frontend/package.json missing — skip'; fi
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
